response.justification: The candidate is a versatile senior full-stack developer with strong testing culture and open-source contributions, but the profile misses the core requirements of this role. The position demands 8 years of C++ and deep large-scale infrastructure/compute experience; the resume shows only a brief C/C++ stint (~7 months at National Instruments) with the bulk of the career in web development using TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang. There is also no formal technical-leadership track record of the kind required to lead strategy for a cloud compute platform.
strengths: Low-latency, high-throughput systems experience at Dunnhumby (millions of HTTP requests/sec)
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, mentoring via workshops and courses
Broad polyglot experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
concerns: Falls far short of the 8-year C++ requirement (only brief professional C++ exposure)
No dedicated technical-lead or people-leadership role; career is individual-contributor web development
Limited production cloud-architecture and large-scale distributed-compute platform experience
